---
title: "Experience"
format: html
css: styles.css
---

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
**01/2024–12/2025**  

#### Biostatistician (Researcher) — IRD  
Montpellier

*Biostatistics-Behavioural ecology of mosquitoes*

- Study design and project management with team members  
- Video analysis and parameters extractions, data management and curation 
- Multivariate analysis
- Machine learning : SVM for unsupervised analysis and HMM for deep characterization of larvae movement. 
- DMP, scientific paper redaction
- Impact: improve knowledge about sublethal effect of insecticides on mosquitoes larvae movement and life history trait.  
🔗 [Project: Mosquito larvae movement](./project_movLarv.qmd)
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**05/2021–12/2023**  

#### Biostatistician (Researcher) — IRD 

Montpellier

*Biostatistics - Pre-clinical efficacy assessment*

- Study design, SAP redaction, sample size estimation 
- Statistics : Survival analysis, GLMM, PK/PD, Mathematical modeling (SEIR)
- Results : general and statistics reporting, scientific paper co-writing.  
- Communications : consortium, international conference
- Supervision of students and formation of consortium members
- Creation of a group around biostatistics and Bioinformatics 
- Impact: Choice of dose and long acting formulation that have a significant impact in reducing malaria transmission. 

🔗 [Project: IMPACT](./project_IMPACT.qmd)
🔗 [Project: Anivermate](./project_anivermate.qmd)
🔗 [Project: RADO](./groupe_biostat.qmd)

:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**06/2020–12/2020**  

#### Biostatistician (Researcher) — IRD 

Montpellier

*Biostatistics - Vector ecology*

- Statistics : rhythm parameters estimation (chisq and FFT periodogramm, onset time, time of maximum activity), GLMM with zero inflation, Hidden Markov Model (HMM)
- Results : scientific paper co-writing.  
- Supervision of students (Msc and PhD students)
- Impact: This project advanced our understanding of how *Anopheles coluzzii* activity rhythms respond to both external and internal variability.

🔗 [Project: Anorythm](./project_anorythm.qmd)
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**09/2018–08/2019**  

#### Msc Biostatistics — Montpellier University 

Montpellier

*Biostatistics - Machine Learning - R*

- Programation : R - SAS - SQL 
- Omics : ML, high dimension reduction, variable selection, genetic algorithm
- Spatial and temporal statistics 
- GLMM, censored data, multi-states models 
- Bayesian model

Internship : [Project: Anorythm](./project_anorythm.qmd)
:::

::: {.timeline-item}

**04/2017–02/2020**  

#### Engeneer - IRD

Montpellier

*Biostatistics - Experimentations - Insecticides and repellent*

- Statistics : R, GLMM, survival analysis (KM and mixed cox model)
- Experiments : Bioassay test with insecticides (OMS), behavioral experiment with mosquitoes, 
electrophysiology (EAG and SSR). GC/MS use. 
::: 

::: {.timeline-item}

**11/2016–12/2016**  

#### Technician - IRD 

Montpellier

*Mosquitoes mass rearing*
::: 

::: {.timeline-item}
**10/2012–12/2015**  

#### PhD - IRD {.job-title}

Cotonou/Montpellier

*Behavioural ecology*

**Behaviour and olfaction of *Anopheles gambiae* : Interaction entre mecanisme de résistance et insecticide.**

- Statistics : R, GLMM, survival analysis (KM and mixed cox model)
- Experiments : Olfactometry, behavioral experiment with mosquitoes, 
electrophysiology (EAG and SSR). GC/MS use. 

<i class="bi bi-book-half"></i> [Thesis](content/pdf/Manuscript_VF1 -diffusion.pdf)
::: 

::: {.timeline-item}
**09/2010–08/2012**  

#### MsC degree in Epidemiology - University of Montpellier

La Reunion Island/Montpellier

*Animal Health and Epidemiology in Southern countries*

- Epidemiology
- Statistics : R, GLMM, survival analysis (KM and mixed cox model)
- Internship : Risk assessment of the introduction of *Varroa destructor* in La Réunion Island. 
Creation of database of beekeepers of the Island, survey redaction and application about beekeeping practices. Reporting to expert and beekeepers. 
::: 

:::
